# Meitheal

> Meitheal (pronounced "meh-hal") is a cooperative task and life management engine running as a Home Assistant addon. It manages household tasks, to-do lists, projects, and calendar events with voice control, AI agent integration (LLM API, MCP, A2A), and deep Home Assistant event bus integration.

Important notes:
- Meitheal runs inside the Home Assistant Supervisor as an addon, not a standalone app
- Authentication is handled by HA Supervisor ingress — no separate auth required
- All 13 tools are exposed across 3 surfaces: LLM API, MCP, and A2A
- Voice commands work with HA's built-in Assist without any LLM configured
- Tasks sync bidirectionally with HA todo entities and calendar entities

## API Reference

- [Full API and tool reference](/llms-full.txt): Complete REST API, MCP tools, LLM tools, voice commands, services, data model, and event bus reference

## Agent Protocols

- [MCP Discovery](/.well-known/mcp.json): MCP server discovery with 13 tools
- [A2A Agent Card](/api/a2a/agent-card): Dynamic A2A agent card per Google A2A spec §8
- [MCP Endpoint](/api/mcp): POST endpoint for MCP JSON-RPC tool calls

## HA Integration

- [HA Services](/llms-full.txt): 6 callable services (create_task, complete_task, sync_todo, search_tasks, get_overdue_tasks, notify_overdue)
- [Device Triggers](/llms-full.txt): 6 automation triggers (task_created, task_completed, task_updated, task_deleted, task_overdue, board_updated)
- [Sensors](/llms-full.txt): 3 sensors with rich attributes (active_tasks, overdue_tasks, total_tasks)

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Coolock-Village/meitheal): Source code, issues, and documentation
- [Home Assistant Addon Config](https://github.com/Coolock-Village/meitheal/blob/main/addon/config.yaml): Addon configuration reference
